  1. Place the scale on a hard and flat surface. Any soft or uneven areas may cause weighing inaccuracies.

  2. Avoid touching walls or other objects that could affect the weighing results during measurement.

Does the clutter in your bathroom weigh on you? This Brabantia ReNew Digital Bathroom Scale, with its truly minimalist design, will lighten your load! This battery powered digital scale is cleverly compact, but can take up to 180 kg. The large LED display is easy to read, but invisible when not in use. Slim, sleek and oh-so-stylish!

By the gram - accurate digital system with 0.1 kg/0.2 lb graduations.

Battery saver - automatic power off after 10 seconds.

No slipping, no scratching - soft non-slip feet.

Product dimensions measure 30cm by 30cm by 2,4cm. Available in Black and White.

", "highlights": "
  • A stylish yet easy to use bathroom scale
  • Easy to read LED display that goes invisible when off
  • Maximum load capacity of 180kg in 100grm / 0.2 lbs graduations
  • Runs on 4 x AAA batteries (included)
  • Auto shut off after 10 seconds

标题: JVD Dyna Digital Personal Scale - Battery Free
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "JVD Dyna Digital Personal Scale - The Battery-Free Revolution Elevate your weighing experience with the JVD Dyna Digital Weighing Scale. Boasting a design that marries user experience and sustainability, this scale is the epitome of elegance and cutting-edge innovation. • Eco-Friendly & Battery-Free: Say goodbye to the frequent battery replacements. The JVD Dyna operates entirely on advanced dynamo kinetic energy. Just a simple step on a spring pad is all it takes to power the scale up for a minute of usage. A truly marvel for your home if you want to stop purchasing alkaline batteries. • Crystal Clear Display: The weight readings come alive on a lucid LCD display, ensuring clarity at every glance. • Precision At Its Best: Equipped with high-precision gauge sensors nestled below a sturdy 5mm tempered glass platform, the JVD Dyna guarantees accurate weight measurements each time. • Sleek Design & Robust Build: Its sleek dimensions of H25mm x 300mm make it a perfect fit for any room, whilst the ability to weigh up to a hefty 180Kg or 396 Lb ensures its versatility. Choose between the sophisticated shades of white or black to match your décor. • Peace of Mind with Warranty: Your trust is our reward. That's why the JVD Dyna comes with a one-year local warranty. Quality and durability, rest assured. Step onto the future of personal weighing scales. The JVD Dyna Digital Personal Scale – where contemporary meets functionality. Short summary: JVD Dyna digital personal scale is 100-Percent battery-free. Uses advance dynamo kinetic energy to generate power. All it needs is just one simple step on the starter. Clear weight reading LCD display. High precision gauge sensors located below a 5mm tempered glass platform. Dimensions of H25mm/300mm. Weighs up to 180Kg/396 Lb. In white/black color. One year local warranty"}]

JVD Dyna Digital Personal Scale - The Battery-Free Revolution

Elevate your weighing experience with the JVD Dyna Digital Weighing Scale.

Boasting a design that marries user experience and sustainability, this scale is the epitome of elegance and cutting-edge innovation.

• Eco-Friendly & Battery-Free: Say goodbye to the frequent battery replacements. The JVD Dyna operates entirely on advanced dynamo kinetic energy.

Just a simple step on a spring pad is all it takes to power the scale up for a minute of usage.

A truly marvel for your home if you want to stop purchasing alkaline batteries.



• Crystal Clear Display: The weight readings come alive on a lucid LCD display, ensuring clarity at every glance.

• Precision At Its Best: Equipped with high-precision gauge sensors nestled below a sturdy 5mm tempered glass platform, the JVD Dyna guarantees accurate weight measurements each time.

• Sleek Design & Robust Build: Its sleek dimensions of H25mm x 300mm make it a perfect fit for any room, whilst the ability to weigh up to a hefty 180Kg or 396 Lb ensures its versatility. Choose between the sophisticated shades of white or black to match your décor.

• Peace of Mind with Warranty: Your trust is our reward. That's why the JVD Dyna comes with a one-year local warranty. Quality and durability, rest assured.

Step onto the future of personal weighing scales. The JVD Dyna Digital Personal Scale – where contemporary meets functionality.



Short summary:

JVD Dyna digital personal scale is 100-Percent battery-free.

Uses advance dynamo kinetic energy to generate power.

All it needs is just one simple step on the starter.

Clear weight reading LCD display.

High precision gauge sensors located below a 5mm tempered glass platform.

Dimensions of H25mm/300mm. Weighs up to 180Kg/396 Lb.

In white/black color.

One year local warranty

Digital Weighing Scale for Mommy and Daddy

Product Description:

· This weight scale provides accurate body weight measurement.

· Built-in smart gravity sensor system, will automatically turn on when you stand on it. High precision sensors provide more accurate measurements.

· Step-on activation & automatic shutdown after staying idle for seconds. No need to worry whether you have remembered to switch the scale off.

· A must-have for daily life.

Product Specifications:

· Battery: 2 x 1.5 V (7# Lithium)

· Equipped with a high precision strain sensor system

· Capacity: 180kg / 400LB

· Graduation: 100g / 0.2LB

· Mini effective: 0.5kg

· Weight mode: weighing automatic

· Automatic zero resetting

· Automatic switch off

· Unit: Kg/Lb

· Sensor damaged or circuit breaker display: LCER.

Special notes before buying:

· Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may slightly be different from the actual product.

· Please allow slight dimension difference due to manual measurement.

Terms and Conditions:

· Items sold are strictly non-refundable.

· Toys are not covered with warranty.

· Exchange to products is only applicable for items with manufacturing defects and in original packaging within 7 days from the date of purchase and upon presentation of proof purchase. Change of mind and damaged packaging will not be valid for exchange.

· BabySPA reserves the right to change terms and conditions without prior notice.
